hero.title: TrustBallot Observer Portal
hero.subtitle: Authorized ECI Oversight Console. Monitor real-time voting analytics, verify blockchain ledger integrity, and submit statutory election reports securely.

actions.title: Quick Actions
actions.realtime_desc: Track live voting percentages and arrival trends across all polling stations.
actions.ledger_desc: Audit the immutable blockchain ledger and verify transaction integrity.
actions.reports_desc: File mandatory Arrival, Poll-Day, and Post-Poll reports to ECI.
actions.emergency_desc: Report critical malpractice or initiate suspension protocols immediately.

login.title: TrustBallot Observer
login.subtitle: Ensure the integrity of the democratic process.
login.registration_success: Registration successful! Please login with your new account.
login.unauthorized: Unauthorized access is a punishable offense under the Representation of the People Act, 1951.

register.title: Observer Registration
register.subtitle: Secure portal for General and Expenditure Observers appointed by the Election Commission of India.
register.legal_disclaimer: Authorized access only. Registration constitutes acceptance of ECI confidentiality duties under the Representation of the People Act, 1951.
